title: Breathing Techniques
description: How well do you know the science and practice of conscious breathwork?

questions.text: What is the 4-7-8 breathing technique named after?
options: The count ratios of inhale, hold, and exhale

questions.text: Diaphragmatic breathing primarily activates which nervous system response?
In box breathing, what are the four equal phases?
options: Slow inhale, fast exhale, hold, repeat

questions.text: Which breathing practice is associated with energising the body and is used in Kundalini yoga?
What physiological effect does slow breathing (around 5–6 breaths per minute) have?
options: Synchronises heart rate variability with respiration
